reviews.review_description:
I do not know any other Baptistery of these proportions. Huge... Marvellous... Capticating... It's majestic grandeur and simplicity is Intimidating. A perfect place to baptise and to be baptised.

It's architecture indicates it's perfect resonating features, with unparalleled spacy accoustics for an absolute top-class sound experience.

I can imagine, monks, nuns singing a gospel there. Or, even crazier, my favourite singer performing a powerful, galvanic and thrilling song in Latin a capella. What a wonderful imagination inspired by this app!

I've never been to Pisa. The summer of 2025 will be Estate Pisano!
